welcome_text:
Xush omaded!

Dar zer tugmai [T] Tools-ro paxsh kuned.
no_tools:
Haj yak abzor (tool) yoft nashud.

Abzorhoro ba papkai tools/ ilova kuned.
theme_applied: mavzū intixob shud! Barnomaro az nav sar kuned.
lang_applied: zabon intixob shud! Barnomaro az nav sar kuned.
brain_author_text:
Muallif: MrOHUN
Loiha: OHUN Tool Launcher
Naqsh: Full-stack Developer

Oofaridai loihahoe hamchun Zetso IQ va Shinobi Roots.
brain_readme_text:
OHUN Tool Launcher v0.9

Launcher-i sabuk va modulӣ baroi Android.
Barnomai asosӣ hich chizro namedonad — faqat mekushoyad.
Har yak abzor purra mustaqil ast.

─────────────────────
Tarzi kor:

1. Barnoma papkai tools/-ro skaner mekunad
2. Har yak abzor doroi main.py + meta.json meboshad
3. Abzor tavassuti funksiyai open_ui() kushoda meshavad
4. Abzor bo launcher faqat tavassuti tool_api.py aloqa mekunad
─────────────────────
Imkoniyatho:

→ Tool Store   — nasbi abzorho az GitHub
→ Theme Store  — ivazi namud
→ Lang Store   — ivazi zabon
→ Brain        — shumo holo inro mexoned
─────────────────────
Tiknologiyahoi istifodashuda:

Python + Kivy
Pydroid 3 (Android)
GitHub API
Buildozer (dar v1.0 meoyad)
─────────────────────
Ta'rixi versiyaho:

v0.1 — GUI-i asosӣ, sistemai plugin-ho
v0.2 — OutputScreen, open_ui()
v0.3 — NavBar, Settings
v0.4 — tool_api.py
v0.5 — Tool Store
v0.6 — Sistemai mavzūho
v0.7 — Sistemai zabonho
v0.8 — Mavzū + Lang Store
v0.9 — Justujū, navsozӣ, hazf, meta.json
v1.0 — .apk Buildozer (ba nazdikӣ)
brain_devguide_text:
Tariqi soxtani abzor baroi OHUN Launcher

─────────────────────
1. STRUKTURAI PAPKA:

tools/
└── abzor_i_shumo/
    ├── main.py
    └── meta.json
─────────────────────
2. META.JSON:

{
  "name": "Nomi abzor",
  "icon": ">>",
  "color": "#2277ff",
  "version": "1.0",
  "author": "Nomi shumo",
  "description": "Chӣ kor mekunad"
}
─────────────────────
3. MAIN.PY (minimal):

from kivy.uix.popup import Popup
from kivy.uix.label import Label

def open_ui():
    lbl = Label(text="Salom az abzor!")
    p = Popup(title="Abzori man", content=lbl,
              size_hint=(0.9, 0.5))
    p.open()
─────────────────────
4. TOOL API:

from tool_api import (
    get_tool_dir,
    save_tool_data,
    load_tool_data,
    notify
)

get_tool_dir(__file__)
→ roh ba papkai abzor

save_tool_data(__file__, 'data.json', {})
load_tool_data(__file__, 'data.json', default={})
→ hifz va boriri ma'lumotho

notify("Tayyor!")
→ namoishi xabar dar status bar
─────────────────────
5. QOIDAHOR:

→ Hamishe open_ui()-ro nuqtai voridshavӣ kuned
→ Hamai xatohoro dar daruni abzor girid
→ Launcher-ro hargiz crash nakuned
→ Abzorro dar papkai xudash nigoh dored
→ Bo launcher faqat tavassuti tool_api.py aloqa kuned
─────────────────────
6. TOOL MANAGER (lozim):

from utils import tool_manager

TOOL_NAME = "Nomi Abzor"

def open_ui():
    if tool_manager.is_active(TOOL_NAME):
        tool_manager.focus(TOOL_NAME)
        return
    content = YourUI()
    popup = Popup(...)
    content._popup = popup
    tool_manager.register(TOOL_NAME, content, popup)
    popup.open()
─────────────────────
7. MINIMIZE / BASTAN:

def _minimize(self, *args):
    if hasattr(self, '_popup'):
        self._popup.dismiss()

def _close(self, *args):
    tool_manager.close(TOOL_NAME)
─────────────────────
8. MUHOFIZAT AZ PAXSHI TAKRORӢ:

def _start(self, *args):
    if getattr(self, '_searching', False):
        return
    self._searching = True
    ...

def _done(self):
    self._searching = False
    ...
